laws.title: Pregnant Workers Fair Treatment Act
laws.description: Protects permanent, temporary, and seasonal workers and adjuncts from discrimination (on the basis of pregnancy or a temporary or permanent resuring-to-pree disability) and from retaliatory actions. Also foriu high-function risk workers.

laws.title: Family and Medical Leave Act (FMLA)
laws.description: Entitles employees of covered employers to accrue paid and/unpaid leave, including leave for medical conditions; pregnancy; childcare or family care needs related to a conflict in Middle East (for Military Call)

laws.title: Ada Amendments Employer Coverage (CPS)
laws.description: Proposed rule to outlaw class-based sexual harassment in the workplace (extending Title VII coverage).
